title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Morgans, Unknown person #4, Pudding as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Big Brother Personess!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Totto Land is in all sorts of trouble!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please respond!!! What happened to Mama!!? What about Bage!? And what about the cake!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From what I've heard, the situation may be more serious than what's happening on cacao Island right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Big Brother Peros!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At sea - big mom's side...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Yeah, I know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HUFF... HUFF... we haven't lost sight of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Big Brother Mont D'Or! It's me, BAVAROIS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Big Brother Peros is becoming weaker...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Due to leaving his wound untreated for so long!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now isn't the time to worry about that... Perorin:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: give that to me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Nuff... they're currently on the waters near Puffs Island! I didn't think that the situa- tion over here could also be so chaotic!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chiffon and Bege finally dropped off the cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cake is now on Puffs Island!! Perorin

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In just a few minutes...every- thing will be decided!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if that cake is laced with deadly poison...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way for us to stop it anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Inform all of Totto Land... )

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that from here on out, there are only three things that can happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first possibility is that Mama will die from being poisoned!! That will be the end of the big mom pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The second possibility is that the poison won't work, but that the cake will taste bad!! If that happens, Mama's tantrum won't stop, and she'll continue to destroy the country!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The third possibility is that the poison won't work, and the cake will taste delicious!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This miraculous situation is the only one in which we will all survive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Prepare yourselves!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The taste of that cake will decide our fates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Regarding your message, that information is already spread- ing around the country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is going to happen to Totto Land?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Mama can no longer discern anything...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems that nuts Island was destroy- Ed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Morgans
dialogue.text: Hey!! Where are morgans and Stussy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They left the island a while ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What did you say!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Capture them!!! If we let them escape, news of this incident will leak to the out- side world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Especially the journalist!! He must not escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nuts Island - PeANUTS TOWN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pumpster access to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAAAA AHAANN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems like her tantrum still hasn't subsided...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We gave our Lifespans to live in a territory protected by a yonkou, and yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone seems

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Queen Her- Self is the one destroy- ing it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is hope- less... Master Steven spent so many days...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Creating that cake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pori Pori Island* - beans beans town...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if it's Lady pudding... there's no way that cake could be remade in just a few hours....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: CUTLEY ISLAND - Table Town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The cake that Mama was drooling over...!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
